rationale: Top-level safety and mission assurance basis applies to the fake GSE demonstrator.
Pad operations, lifting, pressure, access control, and emergency response are in project scope.
Hazard analysis ATGSD-HAZ-001 requires closure evidence before simulated pad operations.
Welded carbon-steel support frame and lift hardware require structural analysis and record review.
Fracture-sensitive welded and lifted metallic components require traceability and NDE evidence.
Human-rated structural provisions are tailored to operator-adjacent lifting fixtures.
Facility-powered electrical cabinet uses disconnects, overcurrent protection, labels, and access controls.
Bonding resistance checks verify grounding and hazardous touch-potential controls.
Flight-hardware-facing harness workmanship is explicitly in scope.
Harness wire is procured to MIL-DTL-16878 slash-sheet requirements.
Materials screening applies to oxygen service, ignition sources, and operator work areas.
GOX simulator and oxygen-cleaned components make oxygen compatibility applicable.
The removable accumulator is purchased as an ASME-certified vessel and accepted by certificate inspection.
Process piping manifold requires hydrostatic and leak testing.
Flexible hoses are shelf-life, cleanliness, proof-pressure, and periodic-inspection controlled.
Ground support equipment design and release requirements apply.
Electrical GSE cabinet includes interlocks and emergency stop demonstration.
Mechanical GSE includes lift fixture and load-test evidence.
Programmable interlock relay requires validation and rollback evidence.
NDE personnel qualification certificates are inspected for weld and fracture-critical inspections.
Fasteners and metallic hardware require controlled process records when specified.
Heat-treated brackets and fasteners require furnace and material certification records.
Carbon-steel exterior hardware is galvanized and coating thickness is inspected.
Sheet panel ASTM A653 G90 material certifications are inspected.
Cadmium plating is prohibited except for one approved sealed-relay waiver.
Critical parts require preservation, packaging, FOD, shock, and moisture controls.
Architecture and hazard analysis exclude explosive, pyrotechnic, and energetic devices.
Elastomeric pressure-system seals are procured to project MSFC-SPEC-445 notes.
